title: Harris Essentials Walls & Ceilings Twin Set | 1 x Tray, 1 x Frame, 2 x Roller Sleeves | 9"
features: The Essentials 9 inch roller set is ideal for painting large interior surfaces such as walls or ceilings with emulsion paints.
The 9 inch roller frame can be attached to a push fit Harris extension pole, so large areas can be covered faster.
2 sleeves gives you the flexibility to swap between paint colours or still use one sleeve whilst you are cleaning the other
For best results, lightly rinse the roller sleeve in water before use to remove any loose fibres.
description: From the manufacturer Harris Essentials Walls & Ceilings Twin Set 9" Make your interior painting projects a breeze with the Harris Essentials Walls & Ceilings Twin Set. This set includes a 9-inch roller tray, roller frame, and two roller sleeves, providing everything you need to paint large interior surfaces like walls and ceilings with emulsion paints. Harris Essentials Walls & Ceilings Twin Set - 9" Roller Tray, Frame, and 2 Roller Sleeves For Effortless Painting of Large Interior Surfaces Set Contains: 1 x Harris 9" Tray, Roller Frame 2 x Harris Essentials Roller Sleeve 9" 1 x Harris 9" Roller Tray For your painting project... Harris Essentials Walls & Ceilings Twin Set 9" Includes all you need to get a good finish. Make your interior painting projects a breeze A roller set for painting walls & ceilings with emulsion paint. The perfect DIY roller kit Includes a 9-inch roller tray, roller frame, and two 9-inch roller sleeves. Harris quality One of the nation’s favourite decorating brands. For nearly 90 years, we’ve been helping people bring their creativity to life with a range of quality paint brushes and rollers. Upgrade your interior painting projects with the Harris Essentials Walls & Ceilings Twin Set. This complete set includes a 9-inch roller tray, roller frame, and two roller sleeves, allowing you to effortlessly paint large interior surfaces like walls and ceilings with emulsion paints. Attach the roller frame to a Harris extension pole for faster coverage and switch between the two roller sleeves for easy color swapping or continuous painting while cleaning. Prepare the roller sleeve before use for optimal results and enjoy a seamless painting experience. Achieve professional-looking results with ease using the Harris Essentials Walls & Ceilings Twin Set. Q: What surfaces can I use this twin set on? A: This twin set is ideal for painting large interior flat walls and ceilings. Q: What does the set include? A: The set includes a 9-inch roller tray, roller frame, and two 9-inch roller sleeves. Q: Can I attach the roller frame to an extension pole? A: Yes! The roller frame can be easily attached to a Harris extension pole for faster coverage of large areas. Q: How many roller sleeves are included? A: The set includes two 9-inch roller sleeves for added flexibility. Q: Can I use this set with emulsion paints? A: Yes, the twin set is ideal for general painting with emulsion paints. Q: How do I clean the roller sleeves after use? A: After using water-based paints, remove the excess paint with a multi-tool, wash the roller sleeve in warm soapy water, and scrape over the surface of the roller to ensure all paint is removed. Allow it to dry standing up. Three Quality Levels to Choose From Harris Essentials Painting & Decorating Tools Range The Essentials range is a straightforward selection of basic yet reliable decorating and painting tools, that help you get those painting jobs done in a quick & easy way. Offers excellent value for money and gives you all the decorating and painting tools you need when on a budget. Harris Seriously Good Painting & Decorating Tools Range Seriously Good is our mid-range of decorating and painting tools, offering quality paint brushes, paint rollers and decorating and painting tools that perform well without too much effort. Harris Ultimate Painting & Decorating Tools Range Superior in quality, look and feel, the Ultimate range is our best decorating and painting tools range. It combines innovative materials so the paint brushes and paint rollers give an excellent paint finish whilst making your decorating task easier.
